@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "flatcar-container-linux-106-kernel-sources-not-loading-in-developmental-containe",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "flatcar-container-linux: Kernel Sources not loading in Developmental Container",
+    "description": "Kernel Sources not loading in Developmental Container. This issue affects 10+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify flatcar-container-linux troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your flatcar-container-linux deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n flatcar-container-linux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flatcar-container-linux\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flatcar-container-linux -n flatcar-container-linux --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review flatcar-container-linux configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant flatcar-container-linux configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n flatcar-container-linux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flatcar-container-linux\nkubectl get configmap -n flatcar-container-linux -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=flatcar-container-linux\n```\n**Description**\n\nWe are not able to get sources for the kernel in the Flatcar Development container."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Kernel Sources not loading in Developmental Container",
+        "description": "Every new release from now on will include the change, on any channel because we included the fix in every channel. Assuming you are on the Stable channel, then this workaround is only needed for versions 2345.3.1 and below.\n```yaml\nflatcardevelopercontainer ~ # emerge -gKv coreos-sources\n\n\n!!! Error fetching binhost package info from 'http://builds.developer.core-os.net/boards/amd64-usr/2345.3.1/pkgs/'\n!!! HTTP Error 404: Not Found\n\n\n\n!!! Error fetching binhost package info from 'http://builds.developer.core-os.net/boards/amd64-usr/2345.3.1/toolchain/'\n!!! HTTP Error 404: Not Found\n\n\nThese are the packages that would be merged, in order:\n\nCalculating dependencies |Unable to enable loopback interface: EPERM\n \\Unable to enable loopback interface: EPERM\n -Unable to enable loopback interface: EPERM\n \\Unable to enable loopbac\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade flatcar-container-linux to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade flatcar-container-linux:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade flatcar-container-linux flatcar-container-linux/flatcar-container-linux --namespace flatcar-container-linux\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n flatcar-container-linux\nhelm list -n flatcar-container-linux\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Kernel Sources not loading in Developmental… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flatcar-container-linux -n flatcar-container-linux --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n flatcar-container-linux --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Every new release from now on will include the change, on any channel because we included the fix in every channel. Assuming you are on the Stable channel, then this workaround is only needed for versions 2345.3.1 and below.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "flatcardevelopercontainer ~ # emerge -gKv coreos-sources\n\n\n!!! Error fetching binhost package info from 'http://builds.developer.core-os.net/boards/amd64-usr/2345.3.1/pkgs/'\n!!! HTTP Error 404: Not Found\n\n\n\n!!! Error fetching binhost package info from 'http://builds.developer.core-os.net/boards/amd64-usr/2345.3.1/toolchain/'\n!!! HTTP Error 404: Not Found\n\n\nThese are the packages that would be merged, in order:\n\nCalculating dependencies |Unable to enable loopback interface: EPERM\n \\Unable to enable loopback interface: EPERM\n -Unable to enable loopback interface: EPERM\n \\Unable to enable loopback interface: EPERM\n |Unable to enable loopback interface: EPERM\n |Unable to enable loopback interface: EPERM\n /Unable to enable loopback interface: EPERM\n -Unable to enable loopback interface: EPERM\n ",
+        "Kernel module load error: Exec format error\nKernel messages:\n[ 1188.728917] nvidia: version magic '4.19.78-coreos SMP mod_unload ' should be '4.19.78-flatcar SMP mod_unload '",
+        "sudo systemd-nspawn \\    \n    --capability=CAP_NET_ADMIN    \n    --bind=/usr/lib64/modules \\   \n    --image=flatcar_developer_container.bin"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
